memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159
memoryArtifacts.description: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

memoryArtifacts.description: Peter FitzReginald in A Genealogical and Heraldic Dictionary of the Landed Gentry of Great Britian and Ireland, pg. 659

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius) in History of Monmouthshire, pgs. 116-118 [but missing the generation of Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer)]
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius) in History of Monmouthshire, pgs. 116-118 [but missing the generation of Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer)] skipping to Grandson Herbert FitzHerbert (FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert FitzHerbert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald FitzPiers於大約1208年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，他的父親Sir Piers FitzHerbert47歲，母親Alice FitzRobert24歲。他於1249年9月與Alice Stanford在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1260年被列為sheriff of hampshire。他去世於1286年5月4日在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald FitzPiers于大约1208年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Sir Piers FitzHerbert47岁，母亲Alice FitzRobert24岁。他于1249年9月与Alice Stanford在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1260年被列为sheriff of hampshire。他去世于1286年5月4日在英国薩默塞特加里 馬利特享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald FitzPiers was born about 1208, in Breconshire, Wales, his father, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, was 47 and his mother, Alice FitzRobert, was 24. He married Alice Stanford in September 1249, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. In 1260, his occupation is listed as sheriff of hampshire. He died on 4 May 1286, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, at the age of 79.

fr.Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales: Brecknock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald FitzPiers est né environ 1208, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzRobert, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice Stanford en septembre 1249, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. En 1260, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of hampshire. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1286, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald FitzPiers um 1208 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Piers FitzHerbert 47 und seine Mutter Alice FitzRobert 24. Er hat im September 1249 in Wales Alice Stanford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. 1260 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of hampshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Mai 1286 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald FitzPiers è nato il circa 1208 nel Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzRobert, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice Stanford nel settembre 1249, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Nel 1260, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of hampshire. Morì il 4 maggio 1286, nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald FitzPiersが約1208年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Piers FitzHerbertは47歳，母Alice FitzRobertは24歳であった。1249年9月にウェールズでAlice Stanfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1260年，職業はsheriff of hampshireと記録されている。彼は1286年5月4日にイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald FitzPiers(이)가 대략 1208년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Piers FitzHerbert(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzRobert(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1249년 9월 웨일스에서 Alice Stanford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1260년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of hampshire이었다. 그는 1286년 5월 4일 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald FitzPiers nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzRobert, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Stanford em setembro de 1249, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Em 1260, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of hampshire. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1286, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ro.Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales: Brecknock, Breconshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald FitzPiers родился около 1208 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Piers FitzHerbert было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzRobert, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Stanford сентябрь 1249 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. В 1260 году он работал по профессии sheriff of hampshire. Он умер 4 мая 1286 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

sm.1260-1262: mai le 1260 e o'o I le 1262

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald FitzPiers nació aproximadamente 1208, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Piers FitzHerbert, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Alice FitzRobert, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice Stanford en septiembre de 1249, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. En 1260, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of hampshire. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1286, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
